entry: Today's note: The drop×bounce lab found a -1.85%/trade edge at drop 2.5%→target 5.5%, and regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting. The edge is still marginal, but it's measured, and measured beats hoped.
good_signals: the drop×bounce lab found a -1.85%/trade edge at drop 2.5%→target 5.5%
regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
